title: KShun Professional M10 Hook Bolt Set - 2 Pack with Nuts - 304 Stainless Steel (A2-70) - 400kg Load Capacity - 116mm Length - Heavy Duty for Fence & Construction Use
features: HEAVY-DUTY 400KG LOAD RATING - PROFESSIONAL GRADE. Engineered for demanding applications with a 400kg (880lbs) vertical load capacity per M10 bolt (4:1 safety factor). One of the highest-rated hook bolts in its class. Horizontal (cantilever) limit: 30kg (66lbs).

304 STAINLESS STEEL - BUILT TO LAST OUTDOORS. Constructed from A2-70 grade 304 stainless steel throughout. Resists rust and corrosion in wet environments, making it suitable for garden, fence, and coastal applications (though not for permanent saltwater immersion).

PROFESSIONAL INSTALLATION KIT. 2 x M10 hook bolts + 2 x matching high-strength nuts included. The nuts are specifically matched to our bolts' thread pitch for maximum clamping force and vibration resistance.

OPTIMIZED DIMENSIONS FOR STRUCTURAL USE. Total length: 116mm | Thread length: 74mm | Hook opening: 13mm. The extended length and M10 thread provide superior grip depth in wood, metal, or composite materials.

DESIGNED FOR DEMANDING APPLICATIONS. Perfect for: marine hardware (freshwater), agricultural fencing, warehouse storage systems, construction site rigging, heavy awning/cover support, and industrial equipment hanging. Where ordinary hooks fail, KShun performs.

Secure Hook Design : Provides reliable anchoring for hanging items like plants, lights, or tools. Convenient Set Options : Choose from M8 (4-pack) or M10 (2-pack) to match your project needs. Easy Installation : Simply drill, insert, and tighten for instant holding power. Garden & Patio : Perfect for hanging baskets, wind chimes, or climbing plant supports. Garage & Workshop : Ideal for organizing tools, hoses, or bicycles. Home & DIY : Great for decorative lights, mirrors, or small shelves. Upgrade Your Hanging Solutions with Reliable Hook Bolts – Order Now! Corrosion-Resistant : 304 stainless steel ensures reliability indoors and outdoors. Secure Grip : Hook design distributes weight evenly for safe hanging. Tested & Trusted : Manufactured to high standards for peace of mind.
